description_long: This obelisk features a tall, slender, and slightly tapering form with a flat, angled tip. Its surfaces are adorned with a bold, abstract pattern in red, black, and white, with the front face displaying a striking figurative artwork depicting two stylized human figures and additional abstract elements. The sides of the obelisk are decorated with dynamic, wavy stripes that continue the color scheme, while the back face shows a close-up of the same motif. The object appears to be constructed from a solid, hard material, likely painted or printed with the vivid design. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, enhancing the visual impact of the artwork. There are no visible inscriptions or interactive components, and the base is not distinctly separated from the main shaft.
description: A tall, slender obelisk with vivid red, black, and white abstract and figurative artwork, featuring a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the obelisk's tapering form and dynamic, wavy red, black, and white striped pattern.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main figurative artwork with two stylized human figures and abstract motifs on a red background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the narrow profile and continuation of the striped pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view with a close-up of the abstract motif, focusing on a portion of the artwork in red, black, and white.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk is decorated with bold, abstract and figurative painted motifs in red, black, and white, covering all visible faces. The front features stylized human figures and abstract shapes, while the sides and back display wavy, dynamic patterns.
attribute_base_design: The base is not distinctly separated from the shaft; it continues the same painted pattern and appears to be a simple, flat-bottomed extension of the main form with no additional decorative features or steps.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and angled, with the painted pattern continuing seamlessly to the top. There are no unique features or decorations at the tip.
